genre_refs: New York Post tabloid front page
description: New York Post tabloid front page. At the top is the black-and-white 'NEW YORK POST' masthead with a small American flag at left and a 'Page Six' logo at right; a thin pink dateline bar reads 'MONDAY, MAY 4, 2026 / Mostly sunny, 71 / Weather: P. 18 / LATE CITY FINAL / nypost.com / $2.00'. The dominant element is a large white all-caps headline 'BUTCHERED'. To the right in bold white-on-black blocks: 'Illegal migrant slaughters two women in LI, including mom of three: cops'. The left and center feature a large mugshot-style photo of a young man with a goatee and a neutral expression, wearing a white garment. Inset at lower right is a photo of a Wendy's restaurant exterior, with a caption identifying the suspect Rony Yahir Alvarenga Rivera, 22, of El Salvador, and a red 'FULL STORY: SEE PAGES 4-7' flag.
notable_text: NEW YORK POST / BUTCHERED / Illegal migrant slaughters two women in LI, including mom of three: cops / FULL STORY: SEE PAGES 4-7
